violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Reachin freezer interior in the prep kitchen and in the storage room noted not in good repair.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of beef pork rice and other ingredients in 1 door upright in kitchen prep area 3 door upright in the storage area was noted not being properly dated for disposition
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Wooden shef edges in kitchen noted to be absorbent. Wire racks in the 3 door upright coolers in the storage area are chipping

EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Employee noted handling food contact items with contaminated hands. Observed staff handling raw beef and then proceed to handling cooked chicken. Observed employee not washing hands between handling dirty dishes to clean dry dishes.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): Inadequate sanitizing with quaternary ammonia was noted in the three compartment sink.

THAWING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (2 pts): Potentially hazardous foods noted not being thawed using approved methods. Observed sealed bags of shredded monteray jack cheese at 70?F that were left out overnight to thaw. The bag of shredded cheese inflated indicating bacterial activity inside of the product.
POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of chicken rice beef was noted not being properly dated for disposition.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in kitchen.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided for quat sanitizer.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Observed meat cutting bandsaw not cleaned after being used the day prior.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Women's and Men's toilet room door noted not self closing.
